author: boma_naps
content: We can follow up on this pr please leave a comment and here https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/791

author: boma_naps
content: I have a question both geth and Nethermind ship a bunch of methods that aren't in the spec some overlap between them (debug_traceTransaction, txpool_inspect, eth_getRawTransactionByHash), others are client-specific. Where do we  draw the line? Should everything that ends up across multiple clients eventually get standardized, or is it fine for clients to keep their own methods  outside the spec? cc <@259648573401071617> <@372731338031366165> <@194432762315407360>

author: s1na
content: didn't we add spec for debug_trace*? would be cool to see the table of client-specific and overlaps

author: boma_naps
content: I will make that and share
